data.name: Captain Hardcore
data.detailed_description:
Get Ready for the Ultimate Galactic Sex Sandbox!

Captain Hardcore is a deep, physics-driven sexual sandbox set across the darkest and most decadent reaches of space.

Board your ship and explore a universe built for experimentation, creativity, and complete freedom. Build your crew, customize every detail of their bodies and outfits, and use your ship’s advanced systems to create, control, and replay your own scenes - all in the name of science. This is your playground, Captain.

Your sexual desires know no planetary limits! Engage in wild experiments using many sex toys and devices. Encounter beautiful women ready to push the boundaries of sexual exploration. Explore and dive into the pleasures of sex and lust in space! Your fantasies are just a warp jump away from becoming reality, Captain!

Harness the power of your ship's Cyber Masturbatorium to create any scene you desire! Pose, animate, spawn toys and objects, adjust lighting, and more. At the heart of Captain Hardcore is a deep sexual sandbox that gives you the tools to experiment as much as you like! Perfect for creative players - build and direct scenes across 16 immersive environments, or craft entirely new locations from scratch using custom 3D meshes, textures, and sound imports.

Your crew has been taken. The galaxy is at risk. Chase the dominant and seductive Nova Celestia across the stars as she hunts for the Ultimate Pleasure Device. Traverse the uncharted expanse of the galaxy and unlock its deepest secrets - what you uncover out here could redefine what it means to be human… or at least, what it means to cum like one.

Tailor your crew to match your deepest desires, fine-tuning every aspect to create the perfect team. How will your unique style and choices shape the appearance of your crew? Each time you revisit your vessel, you can experiment with different body types, skins, faces, hair, clothing and more, ensuring your crew is as alluring as they are adventurous!

Elevate your immersion to a whole new level by connecting sexual toys and raising the pleasure of your adventures! Captain Hardcore supports an extensive array of sex toys, allowing you to engage your senses and experiment with new ways to achieve satisfaction! Prepare to explore uncharted realms of pleasure!

Embark on an amazing sexual experience in VR or Desktop mode! Regardless of your choice, the galaxies always hold many mysteries and surprises for your sexual adventures! Start your ships engines and become the one and only Captain Hardcore!

Campaign & Combat

  • Works seamlessly in both VR and Desktop modes.

  • Campaign with sex scenes, voice acting and procedural environments.

  • Arena Trial mode - fight increasingly dangerous waves of enemies.

Sandbox & Scene Creation

  • Deep sexual sandbox with full-body physics and dynamic posing.

  • Create animations quickly by grabbing and manipulating characters and objects.

  • Craft, save, and load scenes in the Cyber Masturbatorium.

  • Spawn characters, toys, objects, lights, particles, sounds and more.

  • In-game camera and screen system for directing your own porno creations.

  • Adjustable facial expression system.

  • Share your creations in the Captain Hardcore Discord community.

Character Customization

  • Male and female characters with full body customization, including optional penises on female characters.

  • Highly detailed customization with hundreds of sliders and face presets.

  • Extensive selection of skins, hair styles, pubic hair, makeup and tattoos.

  • Over 220 sexy clothing items and accessories to fully customize your characters.

  • Selectable voice profiles with different voice actors.

  • Import skins, tattoos, and makeup for added customization (Supports Daz Gen 3 + 8).

Physics & Interaction

  • Advanced full body physics and dynamic posing system.

  • Realistic penetration physics and interactions.

  • Dynamic character reactions to touch, pleasure, penetration, spanking, grabbing, deep throat and licking.

  • Pleasure and orgasm system.

  • Character POV mode.

  • Real-time fluid simulation for added immersion.

Toys, Weapons & Kinks

  • Over 20 exciting toys with realistic penetration physics.

  • Supports kinks including Gaping, Watersports, Lactation, Squirting, Restraints, Spanking, Pegging, Deep insertions and more.

  • Weapons and kinky tools including

    • Plasma Pistol

    • Clusterfuck

    • Dildo Launcher

    • Jizz Gun

    • Rope Gun

    • Orgasm Gun

Environments & Modding

  • 16 varied sandbox environments, ranging from a futuristic spaceship and neon nightclub to a tropical island, luxury villa, corporate office - and more!

  • Import your own custom 3D objects, textures, and sounds to create entirely new environments and experiences.

  • Large selection of props and objects for building custom scenes.

Immersion & Hardware Support

  • Supports all Steam VR compatible headsets.

  • Attach a motion controller or Vive Tracker to a Fleshlight and sync it with a character’s hips for full-body immersion.

  • Supports all Lovense Toys.

And much more!

英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言
data.reviews:
“This gorgeous sci-fi-themed sandbox delivers a vast variety of more kinky, atmospheric, and LGBTQ sex scene simulators with extensive character customization.”
Mashable

“An outstanding VR porn game set in a cyberpunk environment on a big spaceship, where you get to fuck every space slut you create in every way possible!”
Steamy Gamer

“Captain Hardcore tasks players with exploring the universe and spending intimate time with the “hottest and most depraved space sluts” you can find in the galaxy.”
Daily Dot

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 64-bit
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-12400F or AMD Ryzen 5 5600X
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 1660 Super or AMD Radeon RX 590
  • 儲存空間: 70 GB 可用空間
  • VR 支援: All Steam VR Headsets + Vive Trackers
  • 備註: Minimum requirements are for VR mode. Desktop mode will run smoothly on lower-spec machines.
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 64-bit
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5 12600k or AMD Ryzen 7 7700
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA RTX 3080 or AMD Radeon RX 6800 XT
  • 儲存空間: 70 GB 可用空間
  • VR 支援: All Steam VR Headsets + Vive Trackers
  • 備註: GPU requirements vary by headset resolution

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 64-bit
  • Processor: Intel Core i5-12400F or AMD Ryzen 5 5600X
  • Memory: 16 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GTX 1660 Super or AMD Radeon RX 590
  • Storage: 70 GB available space
  • VR Support: All Steam VR Headsets + Vive Trackers
  • Additional Notes: Minimum requirements are for VR mode. Desktop mode will run smoothly on lower-spec machines.
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 64-bit
  • Processor: Intel Core i5 12600k or AMD Ryzen 7 7700
  • Memory: 16 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA RTX 3080 or AMD Radeon RX 6800 XT
  • Storage: 70 GB available space
  • VR Support: All Steam VR Headsets + Vive Trackers
  • Additional Notes: GPU requirements vary by headset resolution
